SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFENDANT KIM LIEN THI NGUYEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND TONG CHAU INTERPRETS ENGLISH/VIETNAMESE - VIETNAMESE/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
